extensionDescription.message: Set follow-up reminders on WhatsApp Web chats. Never forget to follow up with a customer again.
extensionDescription.description: Extension description shown in Chrome Web Store

setReminder.description: Button label for creating a new reminder

reminderCreated.description: Confirmation message after creating a reminder

reminderCreatedDetail.message: You'll be reminded to follow up with $CONTACT$ at $TIME$.
reminderCreatedDetail.description: Detail message after creating a reminder

presetOneHour.description: Preset time option: one hour from now

presetCustom.description: Preset time option: pick custom date and time

notificationBody.message: Time to follow up with $CONTACT$ — scheduled for $TIME$
notificationBody.description: Notification body text with scheduled time

noRemindersDetail.message: Open a chat on WhatsApp Web and click "Set Reminder" to get started.

markComplete.description: Action to mark reminder as completed

deleteConfirmBody.message: This will permanently remove the reminder for $CONTACT$.

planLimitReached.message: You've reached the limit of $LIMIT$ active reminders. Upgrade to create more.
planLimitReached.description: Error when plan limit is reached

invalidTime.message: Reminder time must be in the future

storageError.message: Failed to save reminder. Please try again.

notificationsDenied.message: Notifications are disabled. Reminders won't alert you.
notificationsDenied.description: Warning shown when notification permission is denied

injectionFailed.message: Could not inject reminder button. Use the popup dashboard instead.
injectionFailed.description: Fallback message when DOM injection fails

reminderNotFound.description: Error when reminder ID doesn't exist

alreadyCompleted.description: Error when trying to complete an already-completed reminder

storageQuotaWarning.message: Storage is almost full. Consider deleting old reminders.

upgradeToPremium.description: Button label to upgrade to premium plan

upgradePromptTitle.description: Title of upgrade prompt when free user reaches limit

upgradePromptDescription.message: You've created $LIMIT$ reminders. Remove the limit and create unlimited reminders with Premium.

trialOfferText.description: Trial offer text in upgrade prompt

billingInfo.message: First charge on day 15. Trial ends automatically if not cancelled.

manageSubscription.description: Button to access subscription management portal

subscriptionEnding.message: Your subscription ends on $DATE$. You'll return to the free plan.
subscriptionEnding.description: Message when subscription is in cancellation state

planDowngradeNotice.message: After $DATE$, you'll have a limit of 5 active reminders.

reactivateButton.description: Button to reactivate a cancelled subscription

paymentFailedWarning.message: Payment failed. Please update your payment method.

updatePaymentMethod.description: Link to update payment method in grace period warning

subscriptionDowngradedNotice.message: Your subscription expired. Your account has been downgraded to free (5 reminder limit).
subscriptionDowngradedNotice.description: Notice after grace period ends and subscription is downgraded

upgradePromptTitle.description: Title for upgrade prompt shown when free user hits reminder limit

upgradePromptDescription.message: Remove the 5-reminder limit and create unlimited follow-ups

trialOfferText.description: Trial offer text in upgrade prompt

billingInfo.message: First charge on day 15. Cancel anytime.
billingInfo.description: Billing information shown in upgrade prompt

tryAgainButton.description: Button label to retry payment after error

unpaidLimitError.message: You've reached your 5-reminder limit. Upgrade to premium to create unlimited reminders.
unpaidLimitError.description: Error message when free user tries to create more reminders

paymentInitiationError.message: Unable to start checkout. Please check your connection and try again.
paymentInitiationError.description: Error message when checkout initiation fails

paymentProcessingError.message: Payment processing error. Please try again.

accountSettings.description: Account settings section in premium popup

manageSubscription.description: Button to open subscription management portal

subscriptionUpgradedMessage.message: You now have unlimited reminders. Enjoy!

subscriptionEndingWarning.message: Your subscription will revert to Free in $DAYS$ days

subscriptionCancelledTitle.description: Notification title when user cancels subscription

subscriptionCancelledMessage.message: Your premium access will end on $DATE$. You'll return to the free plan.

subscriptionDowngradedMessage.message: Your subscription has ended. You're now on the free plan (5 reminders limit).
